data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): brainstorm/SKILL.md is also modified by 8f37-ddb2 (Phase 1 changes). When implementing this task (Phase 2 changes), fetch the current SKILL.md state AFTER 8f37-ddb2 has committed — do NOT base edits on the pre-8f37-ddb2 snapshot. Add AC: verify Phase 1 changes (scale_context / scale-inference prompt reference) are still present after Phase 2 edits by grepping for them post-edit.
